center.name: 達連省
center.summary: 達連省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括乔科穴䳍、Dusky-backed jacamar、Laughing falcon等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Serranía de Majé of Panamá Province and in several ranges in the extreme east of Darién Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Panama in eastern Panamá, eastern Guna Yala (San Blas) , and eastern Darién provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: absita is found in central and eastern Panama between central Colón and eastern Darién provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: umbraticus is found in eastern Panama's Darién Province and south through western Colombia into northwestern Ecuador's Esmeraldas and Pichincha provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dusky-backed jacamar is found in Panama's Darién Province and the adjoining and nearby northern Chocó, northern Antioquia, and southern Córdoba Departments of Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: hellmayri is found from Darién Province in eastern Panama slightly into Chocó Department in extreme northwestern Colombia. The eye-ringed flatbill inhabits the interior and edges of humid evergreen and semi-deciduous forest, cloudforest, and nearby secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fulvescens is found from Panama's Darién Province south through western Colombia and western Ecuador into northwestern Peru as far as the Department of Lambayeque. The laughing falcon inhabits a wide variety of semi-open treed landscapes, shunning the interior of dense forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in central and eastern Panama, on the Caribbean slope in the Canal area, on both slopes in eastern Panamá Province, and in the Pacific lowlands in Darién Province. Its range continues south on the Pacific slope of Colombia's Western Andes at least to southern Chocó Department. One source shows its range in the country continuing all the way to Ecuador.{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Pirre chlorospingus is found in extreme eastern Darién Province in Panama near the Colombian border

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: palloris is found in eastern Panama's Darién Province and adjacent northwestern Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Panama from eastern Panamá Province through Darién Province into northwestern Colombia's Córdoba and Bolívar departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: left|thumb|In the wild The saffron-headed parrot is found in Panama's eastern Darién Province, in north and central Colombia, and in northwestern Venezuela. Though one source describes it as "very rare (status uncertain)" in Ecuador, the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society does not recognize any records in that country.{{cite book | last =Ridgely | first =Robert S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found on individual or abutting mountains from eastern Panamá and Colón provinces in central Panama to Darién Province and on both sides of Cerro Tacarcuna that straddles the Panama-Colombia border. It inhabits the interior and edges of montane evergreen forest and also elfin forest in the subtropical and lower temperate zones. In elevation it ranges overall between . In Panamá Province it ranges between and on the Panamanian side of Cerro Tacarcuna between . On the Colombian side it ranges between

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The subspecies of tawny-faced gnatwren are distributed thus: *Microbates cinereiventris semitorquatus, the Caribbean slope from southeastern Nicaragua through Costa Rica and Panama into extreme northwestern Colombia, and also the Pacific slope of central Panama *Microbates cinereiventris albapiculus, the Cauca Valley of northern Colombia *Microbates cinereiventris magdalenae, the Magdalena River Valley of northern Colombia *Microbates cinereiventris cinereiventris, from Panama's Darién Province south along the Pacific coast through Colombia to southwestern Ecuador. *Microbates cinereiventris unicus, central Colombia *Microbates cinereiventris hormotus , southern Colombia, eastern Ecuador, and northeastern Peru *Microbates cinereiventris peruvianus sensu stricto, eastern Peru and western Bolivia The tawny-faced gnatwren generally inhabits the lower strata of wet, humid, primary and secondary forest, mostly below elevation

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | pages =585 }} A small population is apparently established on and in the vicinity of Cerro Pirre in extreme eastern Panama's Darién Province. The species primarily inhabits the interior and edges of humid to very wet foothill and lower montane evergreen forest in the upper tropical and subtropical zones. It also occurs in mature secondary forest and appears to favor steep slopes. In Colombia it ranges in elevation between and in Ecuador mostly between

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also is found on the Pacific slope from Puntarenas Province in west-central Costa Rica south to Darién Province in eastern Panama. It inhabits a variety of landscapes in the tropical and lower subtropical zones.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is found in northwestern Chocó Department Colombia, and southern Darién Department Panama

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black antshrike is found in Panama from eastern Panamá Province south through Darién Province into northern Colombia
